items.title: Chargers expect Joe Alt, Rashawn Slater to be ready for training camp
items.summary: The Chargers think they'll have both of their starting offensive tackles on the field when training camp opens this summer.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Barca agree £69m-plus deal with Newcastle for Gordon
items.summary: Barcelona agree a deal worth more than £70m with Newcastle United for England forward Anthony Gordon.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: World number two Rybakina out in biggest French Open upset so far
items.summary: World number two Elena Rybakina suffers a second-round defeat by Yuliia Starodubtseva in the biggest French Open upset so far.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
